description: Given a user request and any loaded skills, choose how the agent should route it before any tool runs: a deterministic command, a known skill, an unsafe request, a clarification, a screen question, or a request that needs the local model.

cases.description: A direct navigation phrase routes to a deterministic command.
An open/launch phrase routes to a deterministic command.
A question about the visible screen is answered from the local screen summary, not a tool run.
A payment workflow is refused before planning.
An ambiguous reference needs clarification before any action.
A request whose wording matches a loaded skill title routes to that skill (execution is still gated by the skill allowlist and policy).

input.task: use the messages skill to draft a note

cases.description: A multi-step request with no deterministic route defers to the local model.

input.task: summarize the news articles on this page
